title: Make rootless work under no_pivot_root
body: Previously only done for root isolation

comments.body:
@giuseppe does this look OK ?

Same original issue as #1071

Right. Think I managed to get the logic wrong, as well ("present")

Wonder why it worked ? Or maybe it didn't, tested the wrong thing ?
Wonder if the unshare stuff was needed at all ? Does os.Environment() copy the existing one ?
Right, don't have to copy any variables - the Environment starts out as a copy  (isolation is an _override_)
